members.title: Hier-SLAM: Scaling-up Semantics in SLAM with a Hierarchically Categorical Gaussian Splatting
members.abstract_snippet: We propose Hier-SLAM, a semantic 3D Gaussian Splatting SLAM method featuring a novel hierarchical categorical representation, which enables accurate global 3D semantic mapping, scaling-up capability, and explicit semantic label prediction in the 3D world. members.title: OpenMonoGS-SLAM: Monocular Gaussian Splatting SLAM with Open-set Semantics
members.abstract_snippet: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) is a foundational component in robotics, AR/VR, and autonomous systems. With the rising focus on spatial AI in recent years, combining SLAM with semantic understanding has become increasingly important for enabling intelligent perception and interaction.

members.title: VAR-SLAM: Visual Adaptive and Robust SLAM for Dynamic Environments
